title: Integrated Mending
description: Makes every item with lost durability able to recover with xp.
body:
Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/xHRwb8mPKB)! 


Every item has **built-in Mending**!

There is no need to get the enchantment as every item that has lost durability, can recover with xp as if it has Mending.



Configs Available:

**Server**

- It can be configured whether an item uses xp will consume the xp. Meaning that if an item gets repaired, the player will still get the xp, used or not.
- It can be configured how much durability every xp orb will recover.
